summary: SDK core types - generated from Zod schemas in coreSchemas.ts. Re-exports sandbox types. HOOK_EVENTS const array lists all hook event types: PreToolUse, PostToolUse, PostToolUseFailure, Notification, UserPromptSubmit, SessionStart, SessionEnd, Stop, StopFailure, SubagentStart, SubagentStop, PreCompact, PostCompact, PermissionRequest, PermissionDenied, Setup, TeammateIdle, TaskCreated, TaskCompleted, Elicitation, ElicitationResult, ConfigChange, WorktreeCreate, WorktreeRemove, InstructionsLoaded.
